items.title: Sam Darnold: I didn't play great in the Super Bowl, "kinda bummed" to win that way
items.summary: Winning the Super Bowl was the crowning achievement of Seahawks quarterback Sam Darnold's career, but that doesn't mean he was happy with the way he played.
